fixes_applied.description: Replaced 'expect(print_history_page.plan_pause_info).not_to_be_visible(timeout=30000)' with 'expect(print_history_page.elements.plan_pause_info).not_to_be_visible(timeout=30000)' to add missing .elements. namespace

Replaced 'expect(print_history_page.plan_pause_info).to_be_visible(timeout=30000)' with 'expect(print_history_page.elements.plan_pause_info).to_be_visible(timeout=30000)' to add missing .elements. namespace

Replaced 'billing_card = print_history_page.billing_cycle_period_card' with 'billing_card = print_history_page.elements.billing_cycle_period_card' to add missing .elements. namespace. Also updated all subsequent references to billing_card variable.
Import order was already correct - no changes needed. The common import is already after all helper imports with proper blank line separation.
Removed redundant inline comment '# Pause subscription via Rails Admin' from precondition section. The section comment and log statement already provide sufficient context.

Restructured entire file to follow proper Elements inner class pattern. Created valid Python code with Elements class containing selector strings as class attributes. Removed all instructional comments and section dividers.
Simplified module docstring from verbose 30+ line instruction manual to concise 7-line docstring with essential information only (target file, test case, basic merge instructions).
Removed all instructional comments, section headers with equals signs, and 'ADD THESE...' style comments. File now contains only valid Python code with standard docstrings and inline comments.

Fixed property method indentation. Changed from incorrect 4-space indentation (as if inside a class) to module-level (no indentation) with comment indicating they should be added to PrintHistoryPage class body.

fix_actions_applied: RESTRUCTURE × 2 (Elements class structure + remove instructional comments)

post_fix_summary.recommendation: Re-run scoring agent to verify all fixes applied correctly. Expected score: 100/100 with zero violations remaining.
